content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the car well-positioned on the straight transitioning into the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 18 + 5 = 23
Waypoint 23: (6.502514, 0.718808)
Car position: (5.650183, 0.655580)
Bearing = atan2(0.718808 - 0.655580, 6.502514 - 5.650183) = atan2(0.063228, 0.852331) = atan2(0.063228, 0.852331) ≈ 4.25°
Delta = 4.25 - (-1.131) = 5.38° → very slight left, borderline 0 or 2.5 steering
